_publications._publicationTitle: STING activation reprograms the microenvironment to sensitize NF1-related malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for immunotherapy.

_contextSnippet: We first tested ADU-S100 on 2 different MPNST cell lines: a mouse MPNST cell line derived from Nf1- and p53-null skin progenitor cells (HTS-Luc MPNST) and cis MPNST cells
details: ADU-S100 treatment activated STING pathway with increased p-IRF and p-NF-κB expression after 8 hours
